_components.$content:
The heavy armor of a Cyberdrone is further reinforced with a thick frontal layer of hardened alien alloys, conferring benefits not unlike those of a shield. (As a reminder: Shields in Unification War behave like  {{_context.tooltips.concept filename:"armour" text:"armour"}}.)

Cyberdrone plating has a 100% chance of blocking any projectile, melee attack, or explosion striking the Cyberdrone's forward 90-degree arc, but the protection offered at the sides declines linearly until it reaches 20% at the edges of the frontal 180-degree arc. No protection is offered to the rear,  against weapons dealing gas damage, or against environmental effects such as smoke, fire, or corrosive gas.

Any damage absorbed by Cyberdrone plating will reduce its Armour, and the plating is destroyed when this reaches 0.
